docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PERKINS, MICHAEL CURTIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BIG DOG CITY CORPORATION DBA YELLOW CAB OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

DEFENDANT BIG DOG CITY CORPORATION DBA YELLOW CAB OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT IS NELSON CHICAS. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
